problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: If Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
